issue_title: fix: Networks page doesn't work in dev mode
issue_body_preview:
### Summary
- `network` route now redirects to v2 network page

### How to test:
- Go to https://snapshot.org/#/?filter=networks it throws in console and Add network button will be hidden
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5ac6e337-6959-417b-8254-7e5f8150e852)
- In dev mode, i
test_description_zh: 访问 Snapshot 的网络列表页面（/?filter=networks），观察页面是否正常渲染，检查控制台是否有报错，以及「Add network」按钮是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 网络列表页面正常加载，无控制台错误，「Add network」按钮正常显示可见，页面内容完整渲染。
